canonical_actions.instruction: Rinse the eyes gently with water for 15-20 minutes.
Remove contact lenses after the first 5 minutes if present.

do_not_do.instruction: Do not stop rinsing before the minimum rinse period.

immediate_actions.instruction: Bilas mata perlahan dengan air selama 15-20 menit.
Lepaskan lensa kontak setelah 5 menit pertama jika ada.

do_not_do.instruction: Jangan berhenti membilas sebelum batas waktu minimum.
